category_sources: Official GitHub README describes yuque-dl as downloading Yuque knowledge bases to local Markdown.
source_facts.description says it is a knowledge base downloader for Yuque.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repo/README title is yuque-dl.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides prerequisites, install, usage, examples, private knowledge-base notes, and troubleshooting.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README identifies the project and usage.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page https://github.com/gxr404/yuque-dl.
tags_sources: Official README documents downloading Yuque knowledge bases as local Markdown and Node.js prerequisites.
